species.citation: (L.) Kuntze , Revis. Gen. Pl. 2 (1891) 704 ; Drenth, Blumea 20 (1972) 375; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 809; Romeroso et al., Asian J. Biol. Life Sc. 10 (2021) 437; ≡ Leontice leontopetaloides L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 313. = Tacca pinnatifida J.R.Forst. & G.Forst. , Char. Gen. Pl., 2nd Ed. (1776) 70 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 150; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 215.
species.distribution: Africa, Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, Cambodia, India, Indian Ocean, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malaysia, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. ALIGUAY, BORACAY (photos), BUSUANGA, HOMONHON, HUNDRED ISLS (photos), LUZON: Aurora (photos), Bataan, NCR, MANGSEE, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY, SEMIRARA, SILLON (photos), SULU ARCHIPELAGO.

species.citation: Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1827) 83 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 150; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 214; Drenth, Blumea 20 (1972) 397; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 814; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 990. = Tacca elmeri Krause , LPB 6 (1914) 2283 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 214.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malaysia, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam.
